bead.title: availability: Availability/Performance section toggle on /providers
bead.description: Add a Performance section toggle alongside Availability on the Story 9 page. Provider-axis rows drill into /providers/[name]. Coordinate with Story 9's NavShell rename.
bead.acceptance: 1. Availability/Performance toggle visible. 2. Performance shows agentMetrics-driven rows. 3. Drill-through links match Story 8 filter chip query-param schema.
